name: A Dark Tunnel
description:
You are in a very dark and stunky tunnel that is making you dizzy, maybe you
should go back before you throw up your breakfast, and besides this look like
the perfect place for an ambush. It feels like if you where stepping on some-
thing, you look down and it is an ugly, fat and dirty rat. Oh dear in what
place you have ended, you can go back west or continue east.
